topic: Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation: MCP + A2A Governance Explained
keyword: agentic ai foundation mcp a2a governance

competitors.title: Linux Foundation Announces the Formation of the Agentic AI Foundation (AAIF)
key_points: Linux Foundation announced Agentic AI Foundation (AAIF) in December 2025
AAIF includes Model Context Protocol (MCP), goose, and AGENTS.md projects
Designed for neutral stewardship of open, interoperable agentic AI infrastructure
Foundation supports transition of AI agents from experimentation to production

competitors.title: Linux Foundation Agentic AI: MCP Governance Shifts in 2026
key_points: Agentic AI Foundation launched April 2026 with MCP, goose, AGENTS.md contributions
150 member organizations, making it fastest-growing Linux Foundation foundation
MCP governance shift to neutral Linux Foundation has major implications for standardization
Enterprise adoption of AI agents depends on open governance and standards

competitors.title: MCP Joins Linux Foundation 2026: What the Agentic AI Foundation Means for AI
key_points: Anthropic donated MCP to Linux Foundation, co-founding Agentic AI Foundation
MCP has 10,000+ servers and 97M+ downloads as of 2026
OpenAI, Block, Google, Microsoft, AWS, Bloomberg, Cloudflare support the foundation
Vendor-neutral governance ensures protocol's future development

competitors.title: MCP joins the Linux Foundation: What this means for developers building AI tools
key_points: MCP donation to Agentic AI Foundation under Linux Foundation management
Provides foundation for long-term tooling, production agents, and enterprise systems
Shared stewardship model for protocol governance
Enhances ecosystem interoperability and standardization

competitors.title: The Linux Foundation's new Agentic AI Foundation and Secure MCP
key_points: AAIF brings MCP, Goose from Block, and Agents.md under open governance
Open standards plus secure infrastructure like agentgateway essential for enterprise AI
A2A (Agent-to-Agent) governance models emerging from the foundation
Security and compliance requirements for enterprise agent deployment

stats.fact: Agentic AI Foundation (AAIF) launched December 2025 with 150+ member organizations
MCP protocol has 10,000+ servers and 97M+ downloads as of 2026
AAIF is fastest-growing foundation under Linux Foundation in 2026
Foundation co-founded by Anthropic, OpenAI, Block with support from Google, Microsoft, AWS
Foundation includes three key projects: MCP, goose (from Block), AGENTS.md
Agentic AI market projected to reach $42B by 2027 growing at 47% CAGR
MCP usage grew 300% in 2025 with enterprise adoption accelerating
AAIF governance model includes TSC (Technical Steering Committee) and membership councils
